title: BITS Pilani – PostDoc Position – 1 Posts

basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani Post Doc Position Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Birla Institute of Technology & Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani) has released a recruitment notification for 1 PostDoc (RA-I) post for candidates with PhD in Physics, Mathematics, Electrical Engineering, or related fields, and candidates can apply via email from 20-05-2026 to 20-06-2026 at bits-pilani.ac.in.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD in Physics, Mathematics, Electrical Engineering, or a closely related field

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BITS Pilani PostDoc Position Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
